# Review Agent
This agent:
1. Reviews pull requests for content improvements
2. Validates:
   - Title clarity
   - Headings
   - Link integrity
   - Image alt text
   - No forbidden content
3. Leaves detailed comments
4. Can merge with approval OR request changes
Workflow:
1. Issue → Draft PR
2. PR opened
3. Agent reviews
4. Auto-comment with feedback
5. Approve or request fix
